program: Hea-lth.co.il National Premium Medical Portal and Marketplace
status: Foundation Wave 0 complete; full 36-workstream commission remains in progress

completed_waves.name: Control plane, preservation baseline, and data room
completed_waves.completion_definition: Research operating system, evidence controls, public-site baseline, seed datasets, governance checklist, preliminary risk register, roadmap, data requests and continuation prompts.

partial_workstreams.summary: Competitor universe seeded; only limited discovery baselines accessed. Official product/pricing/policy/page-level audits pending.
Hebrew seed keyword universe created with required priority terms. Demand metrics, trends, rankings and full expansion pending.
Preservation-first URL map seeded from public/link-discovered pages. Full crawl, GSC, backlinks, SERP overlap and redirect analysis pending.
Medical risk tiers, claim ledger, workflow and master brief created. Specialty-specific reviewer standards and operating capacity pending.
Regulation/privacy/security checklist and international standards baseline created. Current Israeli primary-law analysis and qualified adviser sign-off pending.
Research and capital-allocation roadmap created. Product/financial budget and board allocation decisions pending.
Preliminary 47-risk register created. Quantification, control testing and owner assignment confirmation pending.
Initial owner-level questions and data requests are in the memo/data-room file. Full researched answers pending later waves.

unresolved_questions: What traffic, links, conversions and historical signals are attached to every current hea-lth.co.il URL?
What is the venture's exact legal and commercial operating role for leads, booking, concierge, marketplace sales and data processing?
Which provider, clinic, supplier and product records are already contracted, verified and operationally available?
Which 2–3 premium verticals have sufficient demand, supply, response capacity, reviewer capacity and unit economics for the first pilot?
What price observations can be reproduced with a documented source set, date, geography, inclusions and sample size?
Which Israeli Ministry of Health, privacy, advertising, pharmacy, device, accessibility, consumer and finance rules apply to each proposed feature?
What is the current WordPress/UPress/GitHub/plugin/theme/data architecture, security posture and migration constraint set?
What medical reviewers are available by specialty, at what capacity, cost, turnaround and re-review cadence?
What are the historic funnel definitions and rates from inquiry through contact, acceptance, booking, show, sale, cancellation, refund and revenue?
What revenue engine should be funded first: provider subscription, qualified lead/booking, concierge, B2C, B2B quote/RFP or another validated model?

required_inputs.input: Google Search Console property export and access
required_inputs.purpose: URL preservation, query/page performance, indexing and migration risk
Journeys, conversion definitions and privacy-safe measurement

required_inputs.input: Full technical crawl, XML sitemaps, redirects, canonicals, noindex and structured-data inventory
CRM/lead/booking outcome export with pseudonymized/minimized data
required_inputs.purpose: Routing, quality, SLA and unit economics

required_inputs.input: Provider/clinic and supplier/product inventory with contracts and verification evidence
Current contracts, privacy notices, consent text, provider/supplier terms and legal opinions

required_inputs.purpose: Search volume, CPC, KD, current ranks and competitor gaps

required_inputs.input: Paid search, call tracking and campaign data
Owner decisions on first pilot verticals, acceptable regulated scope and capital envelope

next_recommended_run.name: Israeli market, regulation, payer, and supply map
next_recommended_run.completion_gate: Evidence-backed Israeli vertical/payer/supply/regulatory map with exact primary sources, uncertainty labels, legal-review questions, updated risk register and ranked recommendations; no unsupported market-size estimate.

quality_rule: Do not mark any workstream complete until its required evidence, primary-source checks, limitations, deliverable updates and QA results are present.
